backstory.original: Freshly escaped from Hell, Karlach is finally free of the Archdevil Zariel - but not from the infernal engine Zariel planted in her chest. With her first taste of freedom in ten years, Karlach is eager to find a fix for the engine that's burning hotter and hotter before it burns her out completely. But even more premiere in her mind? Exploring, finding like-minded travelers, falling in love (or lust)... and taking revenge on the man who sold her to Zariel all those years ago.
backstory.display: 刚刚逃离地狱的卡菈克终于摆脱了大恶魔扎瑞尔，却没能逃离扎瑞尔埋藏在她胸腔里的地狱引擎。十年来第一次品尝到自由的滋味，卡菈克渴望彻底解决这个越来越灼热的引擎，以免被它焚烧殆尽。但她心中还有更重要的梦想。那就是探索世界，寻找志同道合的旅伴，坠入爱河（或沉迷欲望）……以及报复那个数年前将她卖给扎瑞尔的男人。

description.original: Karlach attacks the closest enemies with a swing of her greataxe.
description.display: 卡菈克挥起她的巨斧攻击最近的敌人。

description.original: Karlach increases her rage cap to 100 stacks and her Infernal Engine's damage by 100%.
description.display: 卡菈克将“激怒”上限提升到 100 层叠加，同时将自己的“地狱引擎”的伤害提升 100%。

longDescription.original: Karlach absorbs the energy of a soul coin, increasing her rage cap to 100 stacks and her Infernal Engine's BUD-based damage by 100% until completing the next boss area.
longDescription.display: 卡菈克吸收魂币的能量，将“激怒”上限提升到 100 层叠加，同时将自己“地狱引擎”基于基础杀招伤害的伤害提升 100%，直到完成下个首领区域为止。

description.original: Karlach increases the damage of all Champions in her column and the column behind her.
description.display: 卡菈克可使她所在纵队和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士的伤害提高。

description.original: Karlach further increases her main support buff each time she attacks or is attacked in an area.
description.display: 在区域中时，卡菈克在自身攻击或被攻击时进一步提升自己的主要支援增益。

description.desc: As a Champion of Zariel, Karlach can be used in any Zariel Patron adventure or variant, even if she would not normally be available to be used due to variant or patron restrictions.
作为扎瑞尔的勇士，卡菈克将可用于任何扎瑞尔赞助者冒险或支线任务，即使以前由于支线任务或赞助者限制条件无法使用。
Karlach increases the damage of all Champions (including herself) in her column and the column behind her by $(amount)%.
卡菈克可使她所在纵队和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士（包括其自身）的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Karlach increases the damage of all Champions in her column and the column behind her.
tipText.display: 卡菈克可使她所在纵队和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士的伤害提高。

description.desc: Your formation gains one Ceremorphosis stack due to the mind flayer tadpole in Karlach's brain. Karlach increases the health of all other Champions by $(not_buffed amount___3)% of her max health, plus $(not_buffed amount)% for each Ceremorphosis stack the formation has, stacking additively.
卡菈克大脑中的夺心魔蝌蚪使你的阵型获得一层“蜕变”堆叠。卡菈克提高所有其他勇士的生命值，数值相当于她的最大生命值的 $(not_buffed amount___3)%，外加阵型拥有的“蜕变”堆叠层数乘以 $(not_buffed amount)%，以加算方式堆叠。

When Karlach attacks or is attacked, she gains a Rage stack, capped at $(karlach_rage_max_stacks) stacks. Karlach increases the effect of The Fury of Avernus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Rage stack, stacking multiplicatively. Stacks are reduced by $(karlach_rage_reduce_percent)% when changing areas.
卡菈克攻击或被攻击时会获得一层“激怒”堆叠，上限 $(karlach_rage_max_stacks) 层。每层“激怒”均使卡菈克的“阿弗纳斯之怒”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。变更区域时，堆叠层数减少 $(karlach_rage_reduce_percent)%。

tipText.original: Karlach further increases the effect of The Fury of Avernus each time she attacks or is attacked in an area.
tipText.display: 在区域中时，卡菈克在自身攻击或被攻击时进一步提升“阿弗纳斯之怒”的效果。

description.desc: While Karlach has $(min_rage_stacks___2) or more Rage stacks, she ignites on fire dealing $(not_buffed amount) second of BUD-based damage for each Rage stack to any enemy that attacks her. (Stacking additively)
卡菈克拥有 $(min_rage_stacks___2) 或更多层“激怒”堆叠时，她点燃火焰，对攻击自己的任何敌人造成 $(not_buffed amount) 秒基于基础杀招伤害的伤害。（以加算方式堆叠）
While Karlach has $(min_rage_stacks) or more Rage stacks, she increases her damage by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Rage stack she has, stacking multiplicatively.
卡菈克拥有 $(min_rage_stacks) 或更多层“激怒”堆叠时，她根据自身拥有的“激怒”堆叠层数，每层提升自己的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Karlach's rage is filled with unmatched fury, increasing her damage.
specializationDescription.display: 卡菈克胸中满是无匹怒气，这提升了她的伤害。

description.desc: While Karlach has $(min_rage_stacks) or more Rage stacks, she heals $(amount)% of her max health every second.
卡菈克拥有 $(min_rage_stacks) 或更多层“激怒”堆叠时，她每秒恢复自身 $(amount)% 生命值。

specializationDescription.original: Karlach's unrelenting ferocity while raging sustains her, healing some of the damage she's taken each second.
specializationDescription.display: 胸怀愤怒之时，卡菈克便狂暴无情，可每秒为自己治疗一些伤害。

description.desc: While Karlach has $(min_rage_stacks) or more Rage stacks, she increases the effect of The Fury of Avernus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each stack of Ceremorphosis, stacking multiplicatively.
卡菈克拥有 $(min_rage_stacks) 或更多层“激怒”堆叠时，她根据自身拥有的“蜕变”堆叠层数，每层提升“阿弗纳斯之怒”的效果 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Karlach embraces the mental connection she has with other Champions undergoing Ceremorphosis, increasing her support capabilities.
specializationDescription.display: 卡菈克投入与其他接受“蜕变”勇士的精神连系，提升自己的支援能力。

description.desc: Karlach increases the effect of The Fury of Avernus by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Zariel Patron variant you have completed, stacking multiplicatively.
每完成一个扎瑞尔赞助者支线任务，均使卡菈克的“阿弗纳斯之怒”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.stack_title: 扎瑞尔赞助者支线任务已完成

description.original: Think really carefully before you square up.
description.display: 三思而后行

description.original: I'll try not to knock you out so hard you can't tap out.
description.display: 我会尽量不让你输得太惨。

description.original: It doesn't matter what happens to me; just get those people out of here!
description.display: 我怎么样无所谓；把那些人带出去！

description.original: Line up, soldiers! We're going hunting.
description.display: 列队，士兵们！我们要去打猎了。

description.original: However many hits you think I can take - double that.
description.display: 你觉得我要吃下多少攻击才能被打趴——你加个倍还差不多。

description.original: I've felt the fires of the hells - this is nothing!
description.display: 我感受过地狱的火焰——这算不了什么！

description.original: COME ON!
description.display: 放马过来！

description.original: Ha! I was almost worried there for a second. Silly me.
description.display: 哈！我还担心了那么一小下呢。我真够笨的。

description.original: Feel that? Time to cook.
description.display: 感觉到了吗？料理时间到。

description.original: Is that all you've got? HAHAHA!
description.display: 你就这点本事？哈哈哈！

description.original: AAAARRRRGGGGHHHH!!!
description.display: 啊啊啊啊啊！！！

description.original: I've fought in the Blood War! YOU CAN'T TOUCH ME!
description.display: 我曾血战厮杀！你碰不到我的！

description.original: This is going to hurt bad. I just want you to know that.
description.display: 这下会疼的要死的。我只是想要让你知道清楚。

description.original: C'mere, cutie.
description.display: 过来啊，小可爱。

description.original: Oh... You're going to regret that!
description.display: 噢……你会后悔的！

description.original: Screaming calms me down. You should try it, Soldier.
description.display: 尖叫能让我平静。你不妨试试，士兵。

description.original: I don't think I've ever felt more powerful.
description.display: 我从未感觉自己如此强大。

effects.description: Increases the BUD damage of Karlach's Infernal Engine ability by $amount%.

description.original: Avernus taught me everything there is to know about pain. Let me show you.
description.display: 阿弗纳斯教会了我有关痛苦的一切。我来让你见识一下吧。

description.original: Always bet on Mama K!
description.display: 押 K 妈妈就对了！

character_sheet_details.backstory: Freshly escaped from Hell, Karlach is finally free of the Archdevil Zariel - but not from the infernal engine Zariel planted in her chest. With her first taste of freedom in ten years, Karlach is eager to find a fix for the engine that's burning hotter and hotter before it burns her out completely. But even more premiere in her mind? Exploring, finding like-minded travelers, falling in love (or lust)... and taking revenge on the man who sold her to Zariel all those years ago.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Karlach is a frontline tank that supports her row and the row behind her. Her barbarian rage steadily increases as she attacks and is attacked.

event_upgrades.name: The Fury of Avernus
event_upgrades.description: Karlach increases the damage of all Champions in her column and the column behind her.

event_upgrades.name: Rage
event_upgrades.description: Karlach further increases her main support buff each time she attacks or is attacked in an area.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 刚刚逃离地狱的卡菈克终于摆脱了大恶魔扎瑞尔，却没能逃离扎瑞尔埋藏在她胸腔里的地狱引擎。十年来第一次品尝到自由的滋味，卡菈克渴望彻底解决这个越来越灼热的引擎，以免被它焚烧殆尽。但她心中还有更重要的梦想。那就是探索世界，寻找志同道合的旅伴，坠入爱河（或沉迷欲望）……以及报复那个数年前将她卖给扎瑞尔的男人。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 卡菈克是个前排坦克角色，可支援自己所在一排和背后一排的勇士。她的野蛮人怒气会在她自己攻击和被攻击时稳步提升。

event_upgrades.name: 阿弗纳斯之怒
event_upgrades.description: 卡菈克可使她所在纵队和她之后的纵队中的所有勇士的伤害提高。

event_upgrades.name: 激怒
event_upgrades.description: 在区域中时，卡菈克在自身攻击或被攻击时进一步提升自己的主要支援增益。
